title: More entities
description: A content expansion mod that adds new entities, blocks, items, powerful tools, and new tools to Minecraft.
body:
made in MCreator

warning:
the entities will make loud sounds

Minecraft 1.21.4 – NeoForge
Client-side / Singleplayer only

More Entities is a content expansion mod that adds new entities, blocks, items, and powerful tools to Minecraft.
The goal of the mod is to make the world feel more alive and exciting by introducing unique characters and rare “God-tier” tools that players can craft and use in singleplayer worlds.

🐾 New Entities

This mod adds several new custom mobs inspired by popular characters or original designs.
Each entity has its own model, health, movement and simple AI behavior.

Added entities include:
Meowbah
KC
Pierce
Ein
Aphmau
Zane
Kim
Ryth
Noi
Herobrine
Pheonix SC
Element X
Camman 18
Notch
Dream
Daquavis MC
technoblade
Wifies
CasiStillPlaysMinecraft (me)
TrainerDario
Guiny
2sa
Hatsune Miku
Kasane Teto
Akita Neru
26 MPH
Carvs

These entities make the world more active and fun to explore.

🧱 New Blocks

The mod also introduces new blocks such as:

Copy Of Bedrock

The God Ore

Meownism block

These blocks can be used in crafting or decoration, depending on your setup.

🗡 New Items & Tools

The mod adds a set of extremely powerful “God tools”:

Uranium block

Uranium ingot

Copy of Restone block

Redstone Ingot

Meownism Block

items:
The Holy Meowble
the Quran
the torah

this are ore and you can craft only pickaxes & shovels

Tools:

Axe Of Gods

Pickaxe Of Gods

Shovel Of Gods

Sword Of Gods

Uranium Pickaxe

Redstone Pickaxe

Uranium Shovel

Redstone Shovel

Recipes:

Axe Of Gods Recipe

Pickaxe Of Gods Recipe

Shovel Of Gods Recipe

Sword Of Gods Recipe

Uranium Pickaxe Recipe

Uranium Shovel Recipe

Redstone Shovel Recipe

These items are designed to be end-game tools with high power and special crafting requirements.

Dimension: Meow dimension

the item to go to the Meow dimension: Meow portal igniter

🎯 Why download this mod?

Adds fun mobs to discover in your world

Introduces rare, powerful tools and new tools

Expands gameplay variety without breaking the vanilla aesthetic

Great for singleplayer worlds where you want more content

Lightweight and beginner-friendly

⚙ Compatibility

Minecraft: 1.21.4

Mod Loader: NeoForge

Environment: Client & Server
